name: Hereditary Nasal Parakeratosis (HNPK)
description: HNPK is a hereditary condition in Labrador Retrievers causing thickening, crusting, and fissuring of the nasal planum from a young age. The nose becomes grey, crusty, and painful with fissures that can become infected.
treatment_overview: There is no cure. Regular moisturising with petroleum jelly or specific nasal balms manages the condition. Antibiotic treatment for secondary infections when needed. Lifelong management is required.
prevention_tips: Test all breeding Labradors — avoid affected-to-affected matings
